aiSummaryTip1: This AI summary is generated by analyzing reviews.
aiSummaryTip2: Short reviews are handled securely and only used for summaries.
aiSummaryTip3: Meditrip does not guarantee the authenticity of individual reviews.
aiSummaryTip4: If there are not enough reviews, the AI summary may not appear.
missingFields: Please select keywords and write your review.
